description: Basic functionality for use in any application

categories.Input: Resources that enable user interaction with the application.
categories.Logic: Resources that control the behaviour of the application.
categories.Primitives: Resources that are used to create the basic elements of the application.
categories.System: Resources that are used to manage an application itself.

DigitalToAnalogue.description: A mapping that converts a digital input to an analogue value.

DefaultName.name: Unnamed Mapping
DefaultName.description: Default name for a new digital to analogue mapping.

toValue.name: To Value
toValue.description: Output value when the digital input is active.

DefaultMapping.name: Default Mapping
DefaultMapping.description: Maps a physical input that triggers this digital control.

mappings.name: Default Mapping
mappings.description: Add a physical input mapping to this digital control.

bindings.name: Bindings
bindings.description: Bind IsoRealms objects to Lua variables for use in this function.

Binding.name: Binding
Binding.description: Binds an IsoRealm objects to a Lua variable for use in this function.

variable.name: Name
variable.description: Lua variable name for the bound object.

BindingAdd.name: Binding
BindingAdd.description: Add a binding to this function.

code.name: Code
code.description: The Lua code of this script.

SequenceTrackAction.description: A track that can be used to trigger actions.

execute.name: Action
execute.description: The action to be triggered when this track is triggered.

SequenceTrackAudio.description: A track that can be used to play audio.

value.name: Audio File
value.description: The audio file to be played when this track is triggered.

fadeIn.name: Fade In
fadeIn.description: The duration of the fade in effect when playing the audio file.

fadeOut.name: Fade Out
fadeOut.description: The duration of the fade out effect when stopping the audio file.

volume.name: Volume
volume.description: The volume at which the audio file is played when this track is triggered.

SequenceTrackColour.description: A track that can be used to change a colour.

start.name: Start Colour
start.description: The colour to be set at the start of this track.

target.name: Colour
target.description: The colour to be set when this track is triggered.

fade.name: Fade
fade.description: Determines whether to fade gradually from the previous colour to this one, or just change immediately.

SequenceTrackFloat.description: A track that can be used to change a float value.

start.name: Start Value
start.description: The float value to be set at the start of this track.

value.name: Value
value.description: The float value to be set when this track is triggered.

fade.name: Fade
fade.description: Determines whether to fade gradually from the previous value to this one, or just change immediately.

SequenceTrackScreen.description: A track that can be used to change a screen.

start.name: Start Screen
start.description: The screen to be displayed at the start of this track.

screen.name: Screen
screen.description: The screen to be displayed when this track is triggered.

AnalogueControl.description: Controls for analogue devices such as analogue sticks and trigger buttons.

DefaultMapping.name: Default Mapping
DefaultMapping.description: Maps a physical input that contributes to this analogue control.

mappings.name: Default Mapping
mappings.description: Add a physical input mapping to this analogue control.

BooleanTrigger.description: Trigger actions upon changes of boolean values.

value.name: Value
value.description: Boolean value on which changes will trigger actions.

onBecomingTrue.name: Action on True
onBecomingTrue.description: Action to perform on value becoming TRUE.

onBecomingFalse.name: Action on False
onBecomingFalse.description: Action to perform on value becoming FALSE.

DigitalControl.description: Controls for digital devices such as face buttons, mouse buttons, and keyboard keys.

DefaultMapping.name: Default Mapping
DefaultMapping.description: Maps a physical input that triggers this digital control.

mappings.name: Default Mapping
mappings.description: Add a physical input mapping to this digital control.

filename.name: File
filename.description: TrueType (*.ttf) file from which to load the font.

detail.name: Detail
detail.description: Resolution of the font, higher being more detailed.  TODO: Explain this better.

scale.name: Scale
scale.description: Scaling of the font.  TODO: Explain the purpose of this.

offsetX.name: X Offset
offsetX.description: Tune the horizontal position of all text using this font.

offsetY.name: Y Offset
offsetY.description: Tune the vertical position of all text using this font.

lineSpacing.name: Line Spacing
lineSpacing.description: Tune the amount of space between lines of all text using this font.

Sound.description: Sounds loaded from supported audio files.

filename.name: File
filename.description: Supported audio file from which to load the sound.

Texture.description: Textures loaded from supported image files.

filename.name: File
filename.description: Supported image file from which to load the texture.

Function.description: Reusable parameterized functions written in Lua.

bindings.name: Bindings
bindings.description: Bind IsoRealms objects to Lua variables for use in this function.

Binding.name: Binding
Binding.description: Binds an IsoRealms objects to a Lua variable for use in this function.

variable.name: Name
variable.description: Lua variable name for the bound object.

BindingAdd.name: Binding
BindingAdd.description: Add a binding to this function.

arguments.name: Arguments
arguments.description: Bind IsoRealms objects to Lua variables for use in this function.  Each object to bind is selected when calling the function.

Argument.name: Argument
Argument.description: Binds an IsoRealms object to a Lua variables for use in this function.  The object to bind is selected when calling the function.

type.name: Type
type.description: The type of IsoRealms object to be bound to this argument.

name.name: Name
name.description: Lua variable name for the bound object.

luaName.name: Lua Name
luaName.description: Lua variable name for the bound object.

ArgumentAdd.name: Argument
ArgumentAdd.description: Add an argument to this function.

code.name: Code
code.description: The Lua code of this function.

InputGroup.description: Combine many input handlers into a single group.

input.name: Input Handler
input.description: This input handler will handle inputs as part of this group.

inputs.name: Input Handler
inputs.description: Add an input handler to this group.

value.name: Initial Value
value.description: Default input handler for this switch.

InterruptHandler.description: Trigger actions when the user performs any active input, such as clicking a mouse button or pressing any key.  This can be useful for interrupting demos or splash screens.

onInput.name: Action
onInput.description: Action to be performed upon triggering of this interrupt handler.

consume.name: Consume Input
consume.description: Determines whether the input event should be consumed by this interrupt handler.  If true, then the input event will not be passed to further input handlers.

Project.description: Nest other projects within the current one.

font.name: Normal Font
font.description: Font used for menus, labels, values, etc.

fontSize.name: Normal Font Size
fontSize.description: Size of the font used for menus, labels, values, etc.

codeFont.name: Code Font
codeFont.description: Font used for code (functions, scripts, etc.)

codeFontSize.name: Code Font Size
codeFontSize.description: Size of the font used for code.

onExit.name: Action on Exit
onExit.description: Action to perform upon leaving the project configurer.

onEditor.name: Action on Editor
onEditor.description: Action to perform upon starting an editor.

Sequence.description: Enables values to be changed and actions to be triggered over a timeline.

playing.name: Playing
playing.description: Determines whether the sequence is already playing when the app is started.

loop.name: Loop
loop.description: Determines whether the sequence starts again from the beginning when reaching the end.  If a sequence does not loop, then it stops when reaching the end.

speed.name: Speed
speed.description: The speed factor at which this sequence plays, where 1.0 is normal speed.

InstanceAdd.name: Instance
InstanceAdd.description: Create an instance of this sequence.

name.name: Name
name.description: The name of this sequence instance or track.

startTime.name: Start Time
startTime.description: The starting point within the sequence of this instance.

value.name: Value
value.description: Initial value of this boolean variable.

red.name: Red
red.description: Initial red value of this colour.

green.name: Green
green.description: Initial green value of this colour.

blue.name: Blue
blue.description: Initial blue value of this colour.

alpha.name: Alpha
alpha.description: Initial alpha value of this colour.

Hue.name: Hue
Hue.description: Initial hue value of this colour.

Saturation.name: Saturation
Saturation.description: Initial saturation value of this colour.

Lightness.name: Lightness
Lightness.description: Initial lightness value of this colour.

value.name: Value
value.description: Initial value of this decimal number variable.

value.name: Value
value.description: Initial value of this whole number variable.

value.name: Value
value.description: Initial value of this text string variable.

x.name: X
x.description: Initial X value of this vertex variable.

y.name: Y
y.description: Initial Y value of this vertex variable.

z.name: Z
z.description: Initial Z value of this vertex variable.

texture.name: Appearance
texture.description: Texture to be used for this sprite.

billboardYaw.name: Billboard Angle
billboardYaw.description: Sprite rotates to face the opposite direction of the camera.  This is useful for sprites in 3D environments that need to look the same from all sides, such as trees.

billboardPitch.name: Billboard Tilt
billboardPitch.description: Sprite tilts to face the opposite direction of the camera.  This is useful for sprite in 3D environments that need to look the same from above and below, such as balls.
